attr.title: Super Mario Bros. Remastered
attr.desc: A fan remake of Super Mario Bros., Super Mario Bros.: The Lost Levels, Super Mario Bros. Special and All Night Nippon: Super Mario Bros. Fully recreated from the ground up! Requires original nes rom for assets.
attr.inst: You must provide a copy of Super Mario Bros. for the NES. The launchscript will search for the rom in the port folder and in your `roms/nes` folder.
